case_title: **TRANSFERRED TO FRESNO COUNTY** NICBYTE LLC ET AL VS. CENTRAL VALLEY COMMUNITY BANK, A CALIFORNIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ROBERT S. MCWHORTER IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE TO FRESNO COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT (TRANSACTION ID # 210057977) FILED BY DEFENDANT CENTRAL VALLEY COMMUNITY BANK

PROOF OF SERVICE RE: REPLY TO PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENDNAT'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE TO FRESNO COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT; DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS TO THE DECLARATION OF PARREN JAMES; EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS TO THE DECLARATION OF SUZANNE FOGARTY (TRANSACTION ID # 210060536) FILED BY DEFENDANT CENTRAL VALLEY COMMUNITY BANK

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT CENTRAL VALLEY COMMUNITY BANK'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MET THEIR BURDEN TO DEMONSTRATE THAT SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY IS NOT THE PROPER VENUE UNDER CCP SECTION 395.5. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $17,100 ARE GRANTED TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED AS TO THE FILINGS, NOT THE SUBSTANCE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; ANGELA POURTABIB, CSR #13714; APOURTABIB@GMAIL.COM, 415-601-7054. (D501)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-02-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CENTRAL VALLEY COMMUNITY BANK'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. ON FEBRUARY 26, 2024. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL REAL PROPERTY CASES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS IN SUPPORT OF AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE AND DEPARTMENT NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 14, 2024. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2024 Continued To Jun-26-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Robert S. McWhorter; Buchalter, APC; 916-945-5170; appearing as counsel for defendant Central Valley Community Bank.
Stephen H. Sutro and Suzanne R. Fogarty; Duane Morris LLP; 415-957-3000; appearing as counsel for plaintiffs NICbyte LLC, et al.

Plaintiffs contest the court's tentative decision. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CENTRAL VALLEY COMMUNITY BANK'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is GRANTED. Defendant met their burden to demonstrate that San Francisco County is not the proper venue under CCP Section 395.5. Attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $17,100 are granted to Defendant. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is Granted as to the filings, not the substance.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Angela Pourtabib, CSR #13714; apourtabib@gmail.com, 415-601-7054. (D501)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2024 Continued To Feb-26-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CENTRAL VALLEY COMMUNITY BANK's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on February 26, 2024. That department handles all real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than February 14, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Nichole Jacobs, CSR# 13655 (Tel: 707-761-6596/ E-mail: nicholecsr13655@yahoo.com). (302/RBU)
